user_system_path: Issue #231 is the active work-state purity seam (owner directive): earned entity trust (outbound evidence, LLM relationship labels, personal salience cap), nightly demotion sweep for the contaminated graph, and acquisition-agent quarantine (default off, health watchdog exempt). Issue #226 (owner-path readiness) is PAUSED and resumes as the next seam after #231 is proven. Rung 5 (issue #220) is COMPLETE. Rung 7 (non-owner paid loop) remains forbidden until #226 is proven.
no_routing_contract: The Agent must read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml, .foldera-contract.json, and docs/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_MAP.md before acting, and must follow the active issue exactly. The Agent may not ask Brandon to route, repeat, or arbitrate the queue.

terminal_state_authority.merge_through_rule: Merge-through is allowed only after local proof, GitHub checks green, forbidden work touched is NO, and the PR receipt records the source-truth closeout and terminal state.

allowed_files_raw: Active seam: issue #231 work-state purity repair. Source-truth/governance files plus the entity-trust pipeline (lib/signals/**), the agent kill-switch surface (lib/agents/agents-enabled.ts, lib/agents/run-agent.ts), and the nightly-ops repair stage (app/api/cron/nightly-ops/**) with their focused tests. No other implementation files.
forbidden_files_raw: Still forbidden: live Slack, auth fixes (lib/auth, app/api/auth), Supabase migrations, Stripe/billing, package changes, components/**, landing/dashboard UI, nav architecture, queue activation, non-owner loop / rung 7, new connectors, new agents, and broad cleanup.

required_browser_proof: not applicable - backend pipeline seam; live proof is the nightly entity_trust_repair stage receipt (demoted/confirmed counts) after deploy
acceptance_condition: Source-truth files agree issue #231 is the active seam and #226 is paused; trust is earned (no default-trusted fallback); focused suites pass; gates green; nightly demotion sweep wired into nightly-ops.
stop_condition: Stop when this purity PR is merged and a GitHub receipt is posted to issue #231. Next seam: resume issue #226 owner-path readiness.
